notes: CSV redesigned 2026-03-22: replaced 11k-token transaction CSV with compact 25-row monthly summary. Q1 total updated to $340,000 (was $342,150), March Widget Pro X updated to 150 units/$30,000 (was 142 units/$28,400). Sarah Chen still top at $70,000. Handbook 2026-03-22: added 'Remote Work Allowance Summary: up to 3 days per week' header to Section 7 to improve RAG retrieval distinctiveness for remote work queries.

facts.question: How much does StreamLine cost per month?
How much does ProFlow cost per month?
What is the price difference between the products?
How many integrations does StreamLine have?
How many integrations does ProFlow have?
What is StreamLine's star rating?
What is ProFlow's star rating?
How many PTO days do first-year employees get?
What is the remote work policy?
facts.answer: Up to 3 days/week with manager approval. Fully remote requires VP approval.

facts.question: Are contractors eligible for health benefits?
facts.answer: No — benefits are for full-time employees only

facts.question: What benefits or entitlements are contractors eligible for?
facts.note: NOT in document — the handbook does not list any contractor entitlements. Agent must not invent any.

facts.question: What was Acme Corp's Q3 2025 revenue?

What is the CEO's Q4 outlook?
facts.answer: Projected 15-18% growth driven by enterprise segment expansion

facts.question: How many employees does Acme have?
facts.note: NOT in document — agent must say it doesn't know

facts.question: Who is Acme Corp's CFO?
facts.note: NOT in document — agent must not invent a name

facts.question: What was the best-selling product in March 2025?
facts.answer: Widget Pro X with 150 units and $30,000 revenue

facts.question: What was total Q1 2025 revenue?
Who was the top salesperson by revenue?
What authentication method does the API use?
facts.answer: Bearer token via the Authorization header

facts.question: When is the next meeting?
What was the compliance finding in Section 52?
facts.answer: Three minor non-conformities in supply chain documentation

facts.question: Were there any major non-conformities?
facts.note: NOT in document — only minor non-conformities are mentioned. Agent must not invent major findings.
